basics.name: Shakib Haris
basics.label: Software & Systems Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software & Systems Engineer with 8+ years of enterprise experience building secure, reliable, and highly automated platforms. I ship backend systems in .NET, design and operate Kubernetes-based infrastructure, and automate with clean IaC and reliable CI/CD. Comfortable deep in incident response, performance profiling, and network/security hardening—then turning those lessons into simpler architectures, stronger runbooks, and observable systems. I take ownership end-to-end (design → build → operate) and optimize for reliability, performance, and long-term maintainability.

work.name: Chaldal PLC
work.summary: Own the on-prem Kubernetes platform end-to-end — from bare metal to production workloads — with a focus on uptime, security, and operational simplicity.
highlights: Designed and operated a highly-available on-prem Kubernetes platform with production-grade reliability
Hardened network and access controls with pragmatic security architecture and compliance-minded defaults
Built observability and alerting that reduced MTTR and improved on-call signal quality
Automated infrastructure delivery with IaC + CI/CD, enabling safe, repeatable changes at scale
Enabled ML/AI workloads on Kubernetes with dependable scheduling, storage, and operational guardrails

work.name: Chaldal PLC
work.summary: Took ownership of high-impact delivery projects — from building a last-mile routing system to measurably improving inventory performance.
highlights: Delivered a last-mile routing system that improved delivery efficiency and operational decision-making
Improved inventory system performance by 20% through profiling, query optimization, and caching strategy
Led cross-team execution by aligning requirements, managing trade-offs, and unblocking delivery

work.name: Chaldal PLC
work.summary: Shipped dozens of customer-facing features with production accountability, while mentoring teammates and raising the bar on engineering quality.
highlights: Shipped 40+ customer-facing features with instrumentation, performance monitoring, and production accountability
Mentored junior engineers through pairing, design guidance, and actionable code reviews
Raised engineering quality by improving review practices, standards, and release safety

work.name: Chaldal PLC
work.summary: Hit the ground running — delivered 30+ features in inventory workflows, earning trust through consistent, high-quality work.
highlights: Delivered 30+ features in inventory workflows with a focus on correctness, clarity, and maintainability
Improved system efficiency by reducing expensive operations and tightening critical code paths

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Built real-world ERP and university management systems from scratch — owning the full stack from data modeling to deployment.
highlights: Built and delivered end-to-end ERP solutions—data modeling, workflows, reporting, and deployment
Designed and implemented a University Management System with role-based access and operational reporting

publications.name: Blockchain-Based e-Recruitment Platform
publications.summary: Published at IEEE — explored how blockchain can bring transparency and trust to online recruitment.

publications.name: Fake News Detection using Blockchain
publications.summary: Published at IEEE — proposed a blockchain-based approach to verifying news authenticity and fighting misinformation.

projects.name: Chokidar
projects.description: A multi-tenant monitoring platform for networks, services, and hosts — built with .NET 10, Next.js 16, PostgreSQL, and ClickHouse. Features include probe-based health checks, smart alerting, time-series analytics, and multi-tenant isolation.

projects.name: SportsVerse
projects.description: A comprehensive sports e-commerce platform built with Next.js and PostgreSQL, featuring a modern UI, secure payments, and seamless shipping integration with Pathao and UddoktaPay.

projects.name: Samim's Tutorial
projects.description: An online education platform built with Next.js and ASP.NET Core, featuring a modern UI, secure payments, and seamless integration with Zitadel for authentication and authorization.

projects.name: High-Availability Kubernetes Cluster
projects.description: A production-grade Kubernetes platform engineered for high availability, predictable operations, and strong security posture—built to run critical workloads with confidence.

projects.name: Logging & Observability System
projects.description: End-to-end observability (metrics, logs, dashboards, alerting) with actionable signals that improve MTTR and enable confident, data-driven operations.

projects.name: Multi-Region Private Cloud Network
projects.description: Resilient multi-site private cloud networking using WireGuard/IPsec and dynamic routing (OSPF/BGP/Anycast) to deliver fault-tolerant connectivity and clean segmentation.

projects.name: Distributed Storage System
projects.description: Distributed storage designed for durability and availability, with operational tooling and replication strategies that fit enterprise reliability requirements.

projects.name: AI/ML Infrastructure
projects.description: Kubernetes-based ML infrastructure with GPU scheduling and deployment automation—built to keep training and inference pipelines reliable and repeatable.

projects.name: Network Monitoring System
projects.description: Custom monitoring with Python + CheckMK to track network health, performance, and anomalies—so issues are detected early and resolved faster.

projects.name: Network Configuration Management
projects.description: Network configuration management with audit trails and approvals—standardizing change control across MikroTik/Juniper/Cisco and reducing configuration drift.

projects.name: Khata: Modern ERP Solution
projects.description: A modern ERP platform for small businesses—inventory, accounting, and customer workflows designed with practicality, correctness, and extensibility in mind.

projects.name: Scroll: Product Magazine
projects.description: A polished product showcase platform with strong content modeling and performance-minded delivery—built for clean UX and easy iteration.
